reviews.review_description: This is not free, costs 9.99yr and 29.00 lifetime, most features do not work, hard to test app, free trial say expired, found leftovers on uninstall Recommend not to download load this app cannot test expanded features

developer_response.body: We apologize for the frustration. There are no hidden fees. To keep improving the app and adding new features, we rely on revenue from the Pro version.  AnExplorer offers a free 7 days free ussage to let users test advanced features. Buying Pro unlocks all advanced features completely. Even after free usage, you can still use the entire app, only advanced features and customisations are locked. Thank you for your support and understanding!

reviews.review_description:
I tried everything but purchasing this app to get at least 1 file to transfer from my USBC to the internal SSD and that was a NO GO! I used my Google Drive, which was totally free and less of a headache! <<— Initial Review… 
                     NEW REVIEW BELOW:

January 5,2025 Review: So ignorance is bliss….! I am more than a man to extend my apologies for my own stupidity! These reviews carry weight so I do apologize for the initial ignorance! 
 
In order to transfer files (Or copy a file) You will have to hold down the front trigger (Whichever hand you prefer to use) and then you will see in the top right it says to copy. IF you have multiple files, Goto the top right and click on the gear which will then give you the option to select all. 
Navigate to your internal storage and or the preset selection of your MQ’s Folder Tree. I was harsh on these folks during my initial review. Sooo Frustrated that I have all of these important  files that I wanted to transfer to my MQ3 that I won from my company (Yea… I work for Meta…) from a random drawing! I use one for work but we aren’t allowed to add these apps on our work device and I wouldn’t want to put my mother’s precious memories onto a work device! I started to purchase the program yesterday but decided to wait until the 5 day trial is up , so that I can familiarize myself with the app more. I will commend the support team for IMMEDIATELY reaching out to resolve within an hour or less! I never spoke with them. I do acknowledge and appreciate those actions! That means the Customer support is on point for anyone with issues. Again..IF you are trying to transfer ANY file or folder you have to hold down the trigger for a few seconds and then you should see in the top left (1 Copy). Navigate through the app to the specific folder you want to drop and at the top you will see (Copy “however many you selected” to this location?)an action to proceed to copy. Very easy! Thank you again and I do plan on purchasing as this app is SUPER USEFUL! Definitely overpowers Total Commander in functionality (IMO) from my testing so far.

reviews.review_title: Unable to get SFTP or SAMBA to work
reviews.review_description: It’s an okay app for managing items on the headset, but attempted connections to an SFTP or SAMBA server fail. SAMBA shows an unknown folder and no way to get to the correct folder and SFTP says unable to connect. Other remote SFTP and SAMBA connections (from phone, iPad or PC) work fine. So i’m disappointed and have cancelled the subscription.
